title: stelis paulula
intro: Stelis paulula is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stelis paulula include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of certain diseases and promote overall well-being. Stelis paulula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to address issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
